name: integrity-suite
description: Strict project template for automated setup and code quality.

scripts.start: node dist/index.js || echo 'No entry point configured'
scripts.test:full: eslint . --max-warnings 0 && markdownlint . && prettier --check . && tsc --noEmit && vitest run .integrity-suite/tests && pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:e2e
scripts.test:develop: eslint . --max-warnings 0 && markdownlint . && prettier --check . && tsc --noEmit && vitest run .integrity-suite/tests/meta && pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:e2e

author: Marc Galindo (marcundertest) - https://marcundertest.com
